task_description: Design and implement a Python class for a simple event bus / pub-sub system with support for topics, filtering, and async dispatch.

requirements: subscribe(topic, callback, filter_fn=None) - Register a callback for a topic with optional filter
unsubscribe(topic, callback) - Remove a specific callback from a topic
publish(topic, data) - Publish an event to all subscribers of a topic
publish_async(topic, data) - Publish an event asynchronously (returns immediately)
get_subscribers(topic) - List all subscribers for a topic
history(topic, limit=10) - Return recent events for a topic
clear_topic(topic) - Remove all subscribers and history for a topic
stats() - Return dict with topic count, total subscribers, total events published
constraints: Callbacks should receive (topic, data, timestamp) arguments
Errors in callbacks should not prevent other callbacks from executing
Raise appropriate exceptions for invalid inputs
